meaning: n.助手,伴侣,配偶(通常指妻子,有时指丈夫)
examples: It turns out, though, that he was a conscientious helpmate.
She had now the right to be his helpmate in his all kind deeds.
For God saw that the animals had their helpmate but Man did not.
He married again, divorced and married a lasting helpmate for old age, Vava Brodsky.
